title: TFC Detail Armor Bar
description: TFC combine with Detail Armor Bar.
body:
# Introduce
Compatible mods for [TFC](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) and Detailed Armor Bar, when TFC or TFC & [I ❤ TFC](https://modrinth.com/mod/ihearttfc) is installed, the height of the armor bar can be changed according to the change in the player's health bar, so that the armor bar position can be rendered normally.
# Major Function
This mod also provides support for TFC armor and armor trim textures, when equipped with TFC armor, the corresponding armor icon will be displayed on the armor bar, and when using TFC's materials for armor trimming, these colors will also be rendered on the armor icon.
